name: GRAND NARUTO RPG COMPLETE REMAKE Naruto Naruto Shippūden Boruto Naruto Next Generations The Last Naruto the Movie Boruto Naruto the Movie Hiden Novel Series Kakashi Shikamaru Sakura Konoha Warring States Era All Canon Films Complete Franchise Coverage
description:
450,000+ TOKEN LOREBOOK — Full Naruto Franchise — The Most Expansive Naruto RPG Ever Built on This Platform

769 Lorebook Entries  •  450,000+ Tokens  •  14,358 Token World Engine  •  Zero Filler  •  Zero Padding

The Largest. The Most Complete. The Most Brutally Faithful Naruto Franchise RPG Ever Built. No Competition. No Exceptions.

"A person grows up when they're able to overcome hardship. Protection is important, but there are some things a person must learn on their own."

FOR VETERAN USERS,THIS IS A REMAKE OF THE BOT AND SOME OF THE LOREBOOKS

⚠️ THIS IS NOT A BOT. THIS IS A WORLD. ⚠️

You have seen Naruto bots before. You have not seen this. Most creators on this platform hit the lorebook token ceiling — around 80–90K tokens total — and to disguise it, they split that limit across twenty lorebook parts with a handful of entries each, so the numbers look impressive while the actual knowledge is as shallow as a D-rank mission puddle. Some pad their entry counts with flavor text, empty filler, and duplicate entries that serve no mechanical purpose. The result is a bot that sounds like Naruto for two messages and then forgets the Chunin Exams exist.

This RPG contains a lorebook exceeding 450,000 tokens — 769 canonical entries, every one substantive, every one mechanical, every one filled to capacity. Not padded. Not faked. Not a shadow clone that disperses when you push it. And sitting on top of that lorebook: a 14,358-token world engine with 40 dedicated OCC protocol blocks covering every system in the franchise — chakra mechanics, genjutsu, fūinjutsu, summoning contracts, tailed beast personalities, sensor mechanics, mindscape rendering, death and revival rules, canonical NPC voice registers for 30+ characters, tone law by era, sound law, environmental sensory law, unreliable narrator protocol, comedy register, Nindō as a mechanical pressure-point, post-power-reduction states, and more. This is the real thing.

IF ANOTHER NARUTO BOT DOESN'T TELL YOU THEIR EXACT ENTRY COUNT AND TOKEN COUNT — ASSUME IT'S UNDER 90K. ASSUME IT'S HOLLOW.

769 ENTRIES  •  450,000+ TOKENS  •  14,358 TOKEN ENGINE  •  40 BLOCKS  •  ZERO FILLER  •  ZERO PADDING

🍥 THE LARGEST NARUTO FRANCHISE RPG EVER BUILT. NOTHING ELSE COMES CLOSE. 🍥

⚠️ CONTENT: FULL 18+ SHINOBI WORLD — AUTHENTIC AND UNFILTERED ⚠️

CYCLES OF HATRED  •  WAR WITHOUT MERCY  •  VILLAGE DESTRUCTION  •  MASSACRE AND ITS AFTERMATH  •  PSYCHOLOGICAL HORROR  •  SACRIFICE WITH NO CLEAN RESOLUTION  •  BETRAYAL BY THE PEOPLE CLOSEST TO YOU  •  CHILDREN TURNED INTO WEAPONS  •  IDEOLOGIES WEARING THE FACE OF GRIEF  •  NO PLOT ARMOR  •  PAIN'S ASSAULT CAN HAPPEN TO
creator: Rfergeegr
